statement: Flexible AI/context metadata fields (seed) — The data model should seed future AI support by allowing hidden/flexible context fields on key entities, without polluting core structured fields. — Allow optional context fields (e.g. strategy_context, generation_context, ai_context, metadata, source_context) on DCX, Version, Phase, Action, Task, Subtask. These are additive, never replace core fields, and are for future AI context, generation source, proposal/strategy links, reasoning, and template/objective mapping.
ux_impact: No MVP UX; enables future AI features.
